tasks.description: [2/3] Activity log page UI — chronological feed at /w/[workspaceId]/activity with action type filter tabs, entity links, relative timestamps, pagination via load-more
acceptance_criteria: Server page.tsx fetches initial activity log entries (limit 50) and passes to client ActivityView component
Each entry shows: action verb sentence (e.g. 'created step "Onboarding"'), entity type badge, relative timestamp
Entity name is a clickable link to the entity's tab (build entityTabMap from steps/sections/stages/touchpoints like comments page.tsx)
Filter tabs at top: All + one per ActivityAction value (Created, Updated, Deleted, Completed, Assigned, Commented, Exported, Shared)
Empty state when no entries match filter
'Load More' button at bottom fetches next page (offset-based pagination via fetchActivityLog)
Sidebar nav: 'Activity' item added with Clock icon, between Runbooks and Teams
workspace-shell.tsx: 'activity' added to reserved paths array

patterns_to_follow: Server page.tsx fetches data via Supabase, builds entityTabMap, passes to client view component (see comments/page.tsx)
Client view component uses filter tabs pattern (see comments-view.tsx: activeFilter useState, cn() conditional styling)
formatRelativeTime() helper for timestamps (see comments-view.tsx line 29-35)
Entity type badge using <span> with bg-[var(--bg-surface)] styling (see comments-view.tsx line 131)
Empty state: centered icon + message (see comments-view.tsx line 100-107)
Sidebar nav items: { label, icon, href } objects in NAV_ITEMS array (see sidebar.tsx line 31-42)
Reserved paths: array of strings at workspace-shell.tsx line 47
learnings_relevant: apiFetch unwraps envelope — fetchActivityLog returns ActivityLog[] directly
WCAG AA: never use text-white/15 for functional content, minimum text-white/55

tasks.special_instructions: Follow comments page pattern exactly: server page.tsx fetches initial data via Supabase + builds entityTabMap from steps/sections/stages/touchpoints for entity_id→tab_id linking. Client ActivityView uses fetchActivityLog() for 'Load More' pagination. Use ActivityAction type for filter tabs — map each action to a user-friendly label. Action sentence format: '{action} {entity_type} "{entity_name}"'. Icon: Clock from lucide-react for sidebar. User ID shown as truncated UUID (author_id.slice(0,8)) same as comments-view.tsx.

tasks.description: Progress bar counts skipped steps as 'resolved' — (completed + skipped) / total for progress computation
acceptance_criteria: runbook-view.tsx progress bar uses (completed + skipped) as 'resolved' count instead of completed only
Progress text shows 'N of M resolved' or equivalent that reflects skipped steps counting toward progress
runbooks-list-view.tsx segmented progress bar also counts skipped steps — add skipped segment (or merge with completed segment)
Playbook mode progress (playbook-view.tsx) also counts skipped steps toward progress if applicable

patterns_to_follow: Segmented progress bar pattern in runbooks-list-view.tsx (IMP-013): h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex, teal for completed, blue/60 for in_progress
Add a third segment color for skipped (e.g. amber/40 or white/20) or merge skipped into completed segment

tasks.special_instructions: Three files to update: runbook-view.tsx (main progress bar + text), runbooks-list-view.tsx (list card progress bar), playbook-view.tsx (playbook progress). In each, find where completedCount is calculated and change to resolvedCount = completed + skipped. Update display text. For segmented bar in list view, consider adding a 'skipped' segment in a distinct color (amber or white/20) between completed (teal) and in_progress (blue).

shared_files.note: types/database.ts and client.ts are read-only this iteration — slot 1 reads ActivityLog type and fetchActivityLog, no modifications needed
